nasb.text: Then the woman said to Elijah, “Now I know that you are a man of God and that the word of the Lord in your mouth is truth.”

esv.text: And the woman said to Elijah, “Now I know that you are a man of God, and that the word of the Lord in your mouth is truth.”

cnv.text: 婦人對以利亞說：“現在我知道你是神人，耶和華藉著你的口所說的話是真實的。”

ccb.text: 妇人对以利亚说：“现在我知道你是上帝的仆人，耶和华借你口所说的都是真的。”
